goal: Claril is an open-source, self-hostable architecture & process intelligence workbench for Solution Architects and Architects. It unifies BPMN process models, UML sequence diagrams, and C4 architecture models in one tool, backed by a deterministic logic inspector that catches structural defects and an AI advisor (brand-agnostic, BYOK) that critiques design — grounded by an organization-level Asset Catalog so services are defined once and understood everywhere. The tool is fully useful with zero AI configured; AI is an amplifier, never a gate.

team.name: ui-engineer
team.role: Next.js app shell, Tailwind 4 + shadcn/ui, floating-panel canvas-maximal layout, command palette, design system

team.name: canvas-engineer
team.role: bpmn-js + diagram editors (BPMN/Sequence/C4), custom renderers, SVG theming, finding overlays

team.name: backend-engineer
team.role: Next route handlers + standalone MCP/REST, Better Auth, BYOK provider config, server validation

team.name: db-architect
team.role: Drizzle + Postgres schema, Org→Workspace→Project→Diagram→Version tenancy, roles, migrations

team.name: inspector-engineer
team.role: Deterministic logic-inspector engine (core IP): BPMN graph analysis, rules, soundness

team.name: ai-advisor-engineer
team.role: Vercel AI SDK provider abstraction, BYOK, structured output, grounding on findings + catalog

team.name: catalog-engineer
team.role: Asset Catalog / CMDB: custom-schema engine, asset references, diagram element binding, impact analysis

team.name: docs-writer
team.role: docs/, ADRs, README, Archmantic curation, contributor guides

history.note: Project bootstrapped: name=Claril, AGPL-3.0, Next.js 16 / bpmn-js / Better Auth / Drizzle / Vercel AI SDK stack locked; monorepo scaffolding started.
